name: spring
description: Spring development plugin with practical skills for Spring Boot, Web, Data, transactions, observability, Batch, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Spring Boot, Web, Data, transaction, observability, Batch, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka skills.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared Spring plugin with example-driven skills for Spring Boot application structure, MVC and reactive web stacks, transaction boundaries, observability, data access, messaging, batch processing, and Spring Cloud infrastructure patterns.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Spring Boot shape for this application.
Explain how to structure this Spring Web or WebFlux endpoint.
Review this Spring transaction, observability, Data, Batch, Kafka, or Cloud configuration.
